Bundled reference assets (see user-facing README or project docs for gameplay context):

1) BabylonJS/SpacePirates — https://github.com/BabylonJS/SpacePirates
   - spacepirates/asteroid_V1.glb
   - spacepirates/targetlock.png

2) hdevx/3D-Action-RPG-JavaScript — https://github.com/hdevx/3D-Action-RPG-JavaScript
   - rpg/grass.png
   - rpg/grass.glb

Verify each upstream repository’s license before redistributing or modifying for production.
